# Rule: ipv6_address
# Category: technology
# Jurisdiction: global

# Preserves the first 4 hextets and masks the interface identifier;
# compressed form is preserved when `::` is in the tail. Example:
# 2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334 →
# 2001:0db8:85a3:0000:****:****:****:****.
